ZX Spectrum UDG Graphics Editor

4 Banks × 21 UDGs

UDG Editor and DATA

Edit selected UDG

UDG 1

Left-drag paints. Right-drag erases.

UDG Tools

Basic
Mirror and Rotate
Shift One Pixel

BASIC Export

Selected UDG

Current Bank / BASIC Listing

UDGs are mapped to GRAPHICS-mode keys A–U. On 128K BASIC, T and U are normally occupied by SPECTRUM and PLAY.

6 × 6 Tile Preview

These preview colours are saved with this UDG.

Spectrum Screen Preview / Painter

Screen 1 of 1
Screen Tools
Mode: Paint — left-drag paints, right-drag erases.
Choose UDG (A–U)

Keys 1–4 select a bank; A–U select a UDG. Saved colours become the current paint colours.

Rectangle and Copy Region: drag from one corner to the other. Paste Region: click where its top-left corner should go. Stamp repeatedly places the selected UDG without removing existing tiles.

Build Spectrum TAP

Ready-to-load tape

Builds a real Spectrum tape containing an auto-running BASIC loader followed by the machine-code renderer, all four UDG banks and every compressed screen.

BASIC interface

Screen numbers in BASIC begin at 1. The renderer stores them internally from 0.
